changeSet.author: practice-delivery
changeSet.sql:
DROP INDEX IF EXISTS idx_agent_job_delivery_dedup;
CREATE INDEX idx_agent_job_delivery_dedup ON agent_job ( workspace_id, (metadata->>'repository_full_name'), CAST(metadata->>'pr_number' AS integer), completed_at DESC ) WHERE delivery_status = 'DELIVERED' AND job_type = 'PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW' AND delivery_comment_id IS NOT NULL;
